widgets_values:
RESULT: Prompt → Mascot → Remove BG → Can Label (3 flavors) → 3D Render → Video Ad → Localized Video + Web Banners.
APIs: Firefly (Image+Video) | Photoshop (RemoveBG, SmartObject, DocOps, Rendition) | Substance 3D (Assemble, Composite) | Video Reframe | InDesign (Data Merge)
STAGE 2 — DESIGN THE LABEL: Load PSD template, insert mascot, edit text/colors for 3 flavor variants, render PNGs.
STAGE 3 — 3D RENDER: Assemble can model with label texture, composite with AI-generated background.
A premium energy drink can on a sleek marble countertop with dramatic lighting
STAGE 4 — VIDEO AD: Firefly Video turns the first can rendition into a dynamic video ad.
STAGE 5 — LOCALIZE: Load overlay PNG with transparency, composite onto video ad via Reframe API.
STAGE 6 — WEB BANNERS: InDesign Data Merge batch-generates localized web banners from template + CSV. Images auto-detected from CSV.
grapefruit chunks and rasberries flooding the screen behind and in front of a fizzy drink can. The can remaining visible at the end.
STAGE 1 — AI CREATES THE CHARACTER: Firefly generates a brand mascot, Photoshop removes the background.
A cute cartoon octopus mascot character for a fizzy drink brand, vibrant colors, clean design on white background

info.name: Hackathon - COMPLETE End to End
info.description: Full pipeline: Text prompt -> AI mascot -> Can label (3 flavors) -> Video ad -> Localized video -> 16 web banners. All via Adobe APIs.
